architecture: Restructured data layer with sweep rulesets and cross-referencing

entity_registry.description: Master entity registry (public + private companies) with aliases

taxonomy.description: Master sector and subsector taxonomy with tags vocabulary

investor_registry.description: Investor profiles with deal history and co-investor networks

public_markets.description: Enriched public market entity data with supply chain mapping

robotnik_index.description: Robotnik Composite Index, normalised to 1000.00 on 2025-03-31

funding_rounds.description: Private market fundraising rounds with Robotnik Notes

external_research.description: Academic papers, industry reports, and company filings

predictions.description: Robotnik market predictions with tracking scorecard

cross_references.entity_id: Links all datasets via unique entity identifier
cross_references.investor_id: Links funding rounds to investor profiles
cross_references.public_market_link: Links funded companies to public market data
cross_references.related_tickers: Links funding rounds to relevant public companies
cross_references.mentioned_entities: Links news items to entity registry
cross_references.mentioned_tickers: Links news items to public market tickers

legacy_compatibility.note: Old file paths kept for frontend compatibility. Scripts read from new paths, write to both old and new.
